title: PUBSUB SHARDCHANNELS
complexity: O(N) where N is the number of active shard channels, and assuming constant time pattern matching (relatively short shard channels).

params.description: Pattern to match shard channel names (default: "*")
params.name: pattern

returns.description: List of active shard channels matching the pattern
List of all active shard channels

params.description: Pattern to match shard channel names
params.name: pattern

returns.description: List of active shard channels matching the pattern

params.description: Pattern to match shard channel names
params.name: pattern

returns.description: List of active shard channels matching the pattern

params.description: Pattern to match shard channel names
params.name: $argument

returns.description: List of active shard channels matching the pattern

content:
Lists the currently *active shard channels*. An active shard channel is a Pub/Sub shard channel with one or more subscribers. If no `pattern` is specified, all the channels are listed, otherwise if pattern is specified only channels matching the specified glob-style pattern are listed. The information returned about the active shard channels are at the shard level and not at the cluster level. ## Examples ``` > PUBSUB SHARDCHANNELS 1) "orders" > PUBSUB SHARDCHANNELS o* 1) "orders" ``` ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information {{< multitabs id="pubsub-shardchannels-return-info" tab1="RESP2" tab2="RESP3" >}} [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a list of active channels, optionally matching the specified pattern. -tab-sep- [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays): a list of active channels, optionally matching the specified pattern. {{< /multitabs >}}
intro:
Lists the currently *active shard channels*.

An active shard channel is a Pub/Sub shard channel with one or more subscribers.

If no `pattern` is specified, all the channels are listed, otherwise if pattern is specified only channels matching the specified glob-style pattern are listed.

The information returned about the active shard channels are at the shard level and not at the cluster level.

An active shard channel is a Pub/Sub shard channel with one or more subscribers.

If no `pattern` is specified, all the channels are listed, otherwise if pattern is specified only channels matching the specified glob-style pattern are listed.

The information returned about the active shard channels are at the shard level and not at the cluster level.
